description: .NET version upgrade plan from .NET Framework 4.5 (net45) to .NET 10.0 (LTS)

tasks.description: Convert TraceEvent.csproj to SDK-style project format
tasks.reason: The project uses a legacy non-SDK-style project format which is incompatible with modern .NET. SDK-style format is required before the target framework can be changed to net10.0.
tasks.requirements: Convert TraceEvent\TraceEvent.csproj from legacy non-SDK format to modern SDK-style format. Do NOT change the target framework during this step (keep net45). Remove packages.config and inline all package references into the .csproj. Verify the project builds successfully after conversion.

tasks.description: Upgrade TraceEvent.csproj target framework to net10.0 and update NuGet packages
tasks.reason: The project must be upgraded from net45 to net10.0 (LTS). Several NuGet packages are incompatible with net10.0 and must be updated or removed.
tasks.requirements: Change TargetFramework from net45 to net10.0 in TraceEvent\TraceEvent.csproj. Upgrade Microsoft.Diagnostics.Tracing.TraceEvent from 1.0.21 to 3.2.1. Keep Rx-Main 2.1.30204.0 (compatible). Remove the following incompatible packages that have no net10.0-compatible version: Rx-Core 2.1.30204.0, Rx-Interfaces 2.1.30204.0, Rx-Linq 2.1.30204.0, Rx-PlatformServices 2.1.30204.0. Run dotnet restore. Build solution and fix all compilation errors in a single bounded pass until the solution builds with 0 errors.
